tags: am I really the last of my kind?
did all the puppies eat the kitties?
that may not be so bad 🤭
body:
memetheoryandcriticism:

Somewhere underneath a hot older woman’s desk in a fancy office, there lies a trans catgirl who’s the last of her species and she doesn’t even realize

But I’m not under a hot older woman’s desk. ~pout~
